meta.description: Step-by-step protocol for AI agents generating MSM Portal UI code. Agents must follow this sequence to produce correct, consistent, and user-friendly screens.

phases.name: Understand
phases.description: Gather requirements and map to design system concepts

steps.how: Match the user request to a task type in index.json → task_loading_guide. Valid types: building_a_new_page, implementing_a_form, styling_a_component, adding_a_table_view, handling_user_interactions, connecting_api_to_ui, adding_i18n_strings, registering_a_route, handling_errors_and_loading, code_review.
Extract the entity name (e.g., Campaign, AdGroup, AuctionOrder) and action (List, Create, Edit, Detail, Delete). Entity maps to directory names in kebab-case and type names in PascalCase.

steps.action: Load the required design system files
steps.how: Read the load_order from index.json → task_loading_guide for this task_type. Load files in that exact order. Each entry specifies which sections to read.
steps.output: Loaded context from design system files

steps.how: Look up the entity in api-ui-contracts.json. Identify proto type, model type, converter file, field mappings, table columns, and endpoints.
steps.output: entity_contract with field mappings and endpoints

phases.name: Plan
phases.description: Select pattern, components, and file structure

steps.how: Match action_type to a pattern in patterns.json. Mapping: List → list-page, Detail → detail-page, Create → create-page, Edit → edit-page, Delete → delete-confirm-dialog. For forms embedded in pages, also load form-basic or form-full-page.

Use the pattern's file_checklist, replacing {entity} with kebab-case entity name, {Entity} with PascalCase entity name, {client} with the target client (e.g., msm-default, tving, shortmax, onboard-demo). Follow conventions.json → architecture for layer locations.

For each UI need, consult index.json → decision_trees. For user input: match to user_input tree. For actions: match to user_action tree. For page structure: match to page_type tree. For feedback: match to feedback_display tree. For each component selected, verify when_to_use and do_not_use in components.json.

For every screen, identify all possible states: loading, empty, error, success, partial data. Reference state-machines.json → formInputs for interactive component states. Reference component-behaviors.json for semantic actions and data flow.

List all user-facing strings. Create i18n key structure following namespace pattern from patterns.json → i18n-usage: 'container.{entity}.{action}' for containers, 'form.{entity}' for forms, 'component.{entity}' for shared components.

Review ux-writing.json before finalizing labels, placeholders, empty states, dialogs, and toasts. Choose action-specific labels, recovery-oriented errors, and consistent terminology for both Korean and English.

phases.name: Generate
phases.description: Write the actual code following the plan

steps.how: Thin wrapper only. Import Container, render it. No useState, useEffect, useQuery, useNavigate, useTranslation. Follow conventions.json → architecture → Page layer. File naming: {EntityAction}.tsx (e.g., AuctionOrderList.tsx).

All hooks here: tRPC/msmAPI queries, useNavigate, useTranslation, useInAppAlert, useEntityParam. Compute props for Component. Handle loading state with MCCircularLoader. Handle error state with fireCollapsibleError. File naming: MC{Entity}{Action}Container.tsx.
Pure UI. All data via typed props (MT* interfaces). Use design system components from the selection list. Apply tokens via theme.mcui.* for all styling. No tRPC, no useNavigate, no fetch calls.

Types: MT* interfaces in types.ts or MC{Entity}Form.type.ts. Styled components: SC* definitions in styledComponents.tsx (if more than 3 styled components). Schema: {entity}FormSchema.ts for Yup validation. i18n: JSON at src/i18n/locales/en/{namespace}.json. Route: register in MERouteKey enum, routeTemplate.tsx, and client route.tsx per patterns.json → route-registration.

For each state in the state_matrix: loading → MCCircularLoader (fillParent for full-page, MCLoader for inline), error → useEffect with fireCollapsibleError and navigate away, empty → meaningful message with call-to-action, success → data display. Follow patterns.json → loading-state and error-handling.
steps.output: State handling code in Container and Component

steps.how: Follow conventions.json → importOrder: (1) React and react-related, (2) third-party libraries (styled-components, formik, yup), (3) @moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui, (4) @msm-portal/* internal imports, (5) relative imports.
steps.output: Correctly ordered imports in all files

phases.name: Validate
phases.description: Run validation checks against the generated code using validation-runner.json

steps.how: Apply each constraint from conventions.json → constraints against the generated code. Constraint IDs to check: no-hardcoded-colors, no-hardcoded-spacing, no-hardcoded-fonts, no-inline-styles, formik-required, transient-props, i18n-required, sc-prefix-required, no-direct-mcsingleinput, import-order, no-data-fetch-in-component, page-thin-wrapper.
Check generated files against the selected pattern's validation_checklist from patterns.json. Each checklist item must pass.

For each component used, verify: (1) correct importStatement from components.json, (2) all required props provided, (3) component is inside required parent per compositions.must_be_inside, (4) usage does not violate do_not_use rules.
Execute all check categories from validation-runner.json: architecture, styling, components, contract, i18n, ux_writing, states. Report results using the scoring system (pass/conditional_pass/fail).

phases.name: Evaluate UX
phases.description: Assess the user experience quality using ux-criteria.json

steps.how: Apply each criterion from ux-criteria.json across all categories: information_hierarchy, user_flow, interaction_quality, ux_writing, accessibility, completeness. Score each as pass (2), partial (1), or fail (0) with weighted importance (high=3, medium=2, low=1).
For any criterion scoring below 'pass', suggest specific code changes referencing the correct design system components and patterns.
Calculate weighted score percentage per ux-criteria.json → scoring → thresholds. Report grade: excellent (90%+), good (75-89%), needs_improvement (60-74%), poor (<60%).

abort_conditions: No matching pattern found in patterns.json for the requested page type (valid patterns: list-page, detail-page, create-page, edit-page, form-basic, form-full-page, delete-confirm-dialog)
Entity not found in api-ui-contracts.json and no API specification provided by the user
Required component does not exist in components.json (check categories: Form Inputs (v1), Form Shared, Form Layout, Buttons, Navigation, Feedback & Overlay, Table, Layout)
Target client is not one of the supported clients: tving, msm-default, shortmax, onboard-demo

cross_references.design_system_index: index.json — file loading guide and decision trees
cross_references.patterns: patterns.json — composition patterns with file_checklist and validation_checklist
